title: RAG Pix Regulation
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for interpreting Brazilian Pix regulatory documents (BCB resolutions + MED 2.0). Compares baseline LLM responses against RAG-enhanced responses, evaluates retrieval quality (Recall@K, Precision@K), grounding, and hallucination rates with Phoenix observability.

title: Fraud Detection ML System
description: End-to-end machine learning system for card-not-present fraud detection. Cost-sensitive threshold optimization, temporal validation, modular ML pipelines, artifact versioning, FastAPI scoring service, Docker deployment, PSI-based drift monitoring, and automated retraining simulation. ROC-AUC 0.861, 58.7% expected loss reduction.
